summary.authoritative_rule: 000738 is now a lawful outside-named second-carrier watch because it shows repeated board-local rebound leadership and breakout strength, but it remains blocked from promotion until retained event backing and downstream role/followthrough labeling exist

supervision_rows.learning_reading: outside-named formal/core symbol has repeated locked-board leadership and breakout strength, but it still lacks retained event backing and downstream role labeling required for second-carrier promotion

interpretation: V1.34IS promotes 000738 into the supervision stack without pretending it already satisfies the same evidence standard as the current primary carrier case.
The point is to separate 'worth searching next' from 'already ready for second-carrier promotion'.
